description:
Create a new customer contact in Axelor ERP. Log in with admin / admin, then navigate to CRM > Customers and create a new partner with the following details:

- Company Name: Warby Parker Inc.
- This is a Customer (mark as customer)
- Address: 233 Spring St, New York, NY 10013, United States
- Phone: +1-888-492-7297
- Email: help@warbyparker.com
- Website: https://www.warbyparker.com

After entering all details, save the record.

Login credentials: admin / admin
